channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Palworld gets 400% player count boost on Xbox after Version 1.0 launch - TrueAchievements
item.description:
1. Palworld gets 400% player count boost on Xbox after Version 1.0 launch  TrueAchievements
  2. Both ‘Palworld’ And ‘Palworld 1.0’ Are In Steam’s Best-Ever Playercount List  Forbes
  3. Palworld's 1.0 Update Is Here And Brought In Large Numbers Over The Weekend  MMORPG.com
  4. Palworld 1.0 Update Draws 850,000+ Players on Launch Weekend  TechPowerUp
  5. 'It Has Become a Success Beyond Our Wildest Dreams' — Palworld Dev Pocketpair Decides Against Raising the Price of the Game for 1.0 Launch  IGN

item.title: Waze adds new AI-powered features and customization updates - TechCrunch
item.description:
1. Waze adds new AI-powered features and customization updates  TechCrunch
  2. Waze rolls out new customization features and more Gemini updates  blog.google
  3. Waze Adds AI-Powered Motorcycle Mode and Personalized Navigation  Road & Track
  4. Waze Gets a 'Less Chatty' Update, Personalized Routes  CNET
  5. Waze now learns your preferences, and gets more conversational but less chatty  9to5Mac

item.title: Destiny 2’s Demise Is ‘Existentially Threatening,’ Says ‘Warframe’ Creative Director - Forbes
item.description:
1. Destiny 2’s Demise Is ‘Existentially Threatening,’ Says ‘Warframe’ Creative Director  Forbes
  2. As Video Game Industry Burns, Warframe's Devs Aren't Taking Anything For Granted  Aftermath
  3. Warframe lead Rebecca Ford says Destiny 2's death is "horrible news" for everyone: "Not the first time it's happened, and it'll happen again"  GamesRadar+
  4. Destiny 2 dying is "existentially threatening" for game devs in the industry, says Warframe director  Windows Central
  5. Warframe Dev Reacts To The Sudden Death Of Rival Destiny 2  Kotaku

item.title: Obsidian director criticizes ‘cold take artists’ spreading ‘misinformation’ about the studio’s legacy - Video Games Chronicle
item.description:
1. Obsidian director criticizes ‘cold take artists’ spreading ‘misinformation’ about the studio’s legacy  Video Games Chronicle
  2. Microsoft’s Xbox to Shift Obsidian Studio to New ‘Fallout’ Video Game  Bloomberg.com
  3. Obsidian Director Blasts People 'Running Their Mouths' About How the Studio Has Changed Following Xbox Layoffs  IGN
  4. Obsidian doesn't need to work on a new Fallout game, they already gave us the best one possible  Polygon.com
  5. Obsidian Dev Addresses Critics Discussing Studio's Current Situation  80 Level

item.title: A top Halo studio boss has been repeatedly referred to HR, according to new reports - Windows Central
item.description:
1. A top Halo studio boss has been repeatedly referred to HR, according to new reports  Windows Central
  2. "Destroying Halo": Pierre Hintze Accused Of Mismanagement And Abuse  TheGamer
  3. Pierre Hintze Berated Halo Teams and Dismissed Work-Life Concerns, Sources Claim, as Xbox Leadership Stayed Silent  Wccftech
  4. Rumor: Halo Studios/343 Industries Leadership Accused Of Maltreating Employees  gameranx.com
  5. Scandal at Halo Studios: Management Accused of Abuse and Intimidation  ixbt.games

item.title: I’ve worn the Oura Ring 5 for six weeks: 3 things I love and 2 I’d change - Tom's Guide
item.description:

item.title: New DOOM Game is in Development - Insider Gaming
item.description:
1. New DOOM Game is in Development  Insider Gaming
  2. Update: 136 workers have been laid off at id Software  Game Developer
  3. Microsoft laid off id Software employees, and John Carmack’s response is hitting a nerve  Windows Central
  4. id Software Issues Statement Following Xbox Layoffs, Says It's Back to the Size It Was When It Made 2016's Doom  IGN
  5. id Software producer says 'you'll never get another WoW or Morrowind in the current climate' in the wake of Xbox layoffs  PC Gamer
